summary: Recording reading app with 2/7 class structure and all settings and recording features

existing_features.title: Implement audio recording functionality that allows users to create and save voice recordings
Implement reading playback functionality that allows users to play back recorded audio
Create a comprehensive settings page with all configuration options for recording quality, storage preferences, and playback settings
Design a cohesive visual theme with warm, accessible colors and clear typography that emphasizes usability for a recording and reading application
Add language selection support for Hindi and English in the recording interface, allowing users to specify the language of their recording
Implement paragraph-based organization for recordings, allowing users to segment and organize their recordings by paragraph units
Enhance the RecordingInterface component with language selector dropdown (Hindi/English) and paragraph number input field
Update RecordingsList component to display language and paragraph information for each recording, with optional filtering by language and paragraph

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a 2/7 class structure in the backend to organize recording and reading data models
Store recordings in the backend with the 2/7 class organizational structure, enabling retrieval and management
Add Hindi language support for recording and reading
Add English language support for recording and reading
Update the recording data model to include language (Hindi/English) and paragraph number fields alongside the existing class label structure
